$comment: RubyMIK update manifest served at https://rubymik.com/version.json. Updated by scripts/release.sh on each release. P38 contract.
notes: 1.1.0 — dual-WAN failover, optional DNS content filtering, and one-click in-UI backups (no env var needed). Includes a database migration (schema 24); an automatic encrypted pre-migration backup is taken on first boot. See the changelog.
